pages.text:
AFFAIRES ETRAMUESES

12. JUNE 1950

SECRÉTARIAT

New Featund Legation,

Paris.

UN

The New Zealand Legation presents its compliments to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and has the honou to refer to its previous Notes dated 4 lovembe ON

1949,

and 16 November, 1949, regarding the accession of the.

New Zealand Government to the International Convention relating to International Exhibitions.

The Legation now desires to advise that the New

Zealand Government wishes to accede to the Convention, and has the honour to transmit with this Note a formal letter of accession.

11 July, 1950.

New Realand Legation,

Paris.

11 July, 1950.

sir,

I have the honour, by direction of the Minister of External Affairs, to notify you of the accession of the New Zealand Government to the International

Convention relating to International Exhibitions, signed at Paris on 22 November, 1928.

2. Ihis notification is made in accordance with the provisions of Article 35 of the sala Convention and

Is to be regarded as constituting accession to the

Protocol modifying the Convention, signed at Paris on 10 May, 1948, in accordance with the second para- graph of Article 3 thereof.

3.

I have the honour to request that I may be informed in due course of the date of the receipt of this com- munication by the French Government.

I have the honour to be;

Sir,

Your obedient servant,

argé d'Affaires.

Son Excellence le Ministre des Affaires Itrangères,

Quai d'Orsay,

PARIS VIII.
